patch.value:
## Context
PR #87 shipped: detached worker + reindex lock for non-blocking search refresh (src/core/search/background-refresh.ts).

Unit test: tests/unit/search-cache.spec.ts line 668 describes 'search background refresh'.

The background refresh uses a detached child process. No integration test verifies:
1. create/update returns quickly (before reindex)
2. a subsequent pm search eventually reflects the new item
3. the reindex lock prevents duplicate workers

## Acceptance criteria
- Integration test or expanded unit test that:
  - Creates an item
  - Verifies mutation returns promptly (not waiting for reindex)
  - Polls or waits for reindex completion
  - Verifies pm search can find the new item
- OR: a documented reason why this is adequately covered by existing tests

## Evidence
tests/unit/search-cache.spec.ts line 668; src/core/search/background-refresh.ts; PR #87 session notes
Add integration test for background-refresh (instant mutations) non-blocking behavior

The non-blocking background semantic refresh (PR #87, 2026-05-31) was the biggest perf win: create 2581->239ms, update 1693->265ms. The unit test in tests/unit/search-cache.spec.ts line 668 ('search background refresh') covers the cache-level behavior, but there is no integration test that verifies the end-to-end guarantee: a create/update command returns before the search reindex completes, and a subsequent search eventually reflects the change.

- Integration test or expanded unit test that:
- Creates an item
- Verifies mutation returns promptly (not waiting for reindex)
- Polls or waits for reindex completion
- Verifies pm search can find the new item
- OR: a documented reason why this is adequately covered by existing tests

Integration test asserts the user-facing guarantee: create/update reflect in keyword search with no explicit reindex (synchronous keyword-cache invalidation), the stale token stops matching, and no pending-refresh ids are stranded. The detached-worker dispatch decision is forced inline under test runners (shouldRunSearchRefreshInForeground) and is already unit-covered in search-cache.spec.ts:691; documented in the spec header.
End-to-end non-blocking mutation->search behavior covered, or documented adequacy.
1 deterministic integration test (no timing/flake); dispatch decision cross-referenced to existing unit coverage.
Added tests/integration/background-refresh-nonblocking.integration.spec.ts covering the instant-mutation search guarantee.
